# Junior Workflow Settings

## Project
@project-name: BibliotecaCLI
@project-type: backend-only
@language: csharp

## Branches
@main-branch: master
@dev-branch:
@merge-strategy: direct

## Folders
@code: LibraryApp/
@backend: LibraryApp/
@frontend: n/a
@tasks: tasks/
@docs: sources-docs-pocs/
@tools: tools/

## Commands
@test-backend: dotnet test
@test-frontend: manual
@build: dotnet build
@start-backend: dotnet run --project LibraryApp/LibraryApp.Console
@start-frontend: dotnet run --project LibraryApp/LibraryApp.Gui
@migrations-add: n/a
@migrations-apply: n/a

## Ports
@frontend-port: n/a
@backend-port: n/a
@db-port: n/a

## Deploy
@deploy-script: none
@deploy-docs: none
@domain: none
@backup-script: none
@restore-script: none

## Auth
@auth-method: none
@auth-notes:

## Database
@db-type: none
@db-local: none

## Methodology
@backend-method: tddab
@frontend-method: manual

## Testing
@test-e2e: n/a
@health-endpoint: n/a
@chromedevtools: no

## Local Limitations
@limitations: none
